calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JOHN ZANGHI FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION. AGENT MS. MADERA ALSO PRESENT.
ROBERT KANE FOR DEFENDANT LETICIA GARCIA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: THE TERM OF THIS AGREEMENT IS FROM DATE OF EXECUTION TO JANUARY 31, 2006. DEFENDANT TO RETAIN POSSESSION OF 535 MINNA ST #309 SO LONG AS DEFENDANT PAYS THE SUM OF $1580 ON OR BEFORE 7/22/05. BEGINNING 8/1/05 AND CONTINUING THROUGH 1/31/06 DEFENDANT TO PAY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $790 ON THE 5TH DAY OF EACH MONTH.
DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH THE RECERTITIFCATION PROCESS WITHING 72 HOURS OF PLAINTIFF'S WRITTEN REQUEST. DEFENDANT RELEASES PLAINTIFF FROM ALL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF WILL ENTER A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND REINSTATE DEFENDANT'S TENANCY WITHIN 5 COURT DAYS OF COMPLIANCE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH TERMS, MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SHALL BE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEEKING ENTRY OF A STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES; FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; UNPAID BACKRENT AND DAMAGES FROM JULY 1, 2005 TO THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AT THE RATE OF $26.33 PER DAY(DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY INSTALLMENTS PAID); COSTS OF SUIT IN THE SUM OF $273.30.PARTIES WAIVE ANY RIGHT TO APPEAL AND ANY FURTHER STAYS. PARTIES STIPULATE THAT MOTION MAY BE HEARD ON 5 DAYS NOTICE TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY.
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT NOT FILED WITH COURT

JUDGE PRO TEM:ORA PROCHOVNICK ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:JOANN BRYCE (218)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
